title: openclaw/openclaw

title: affaan-m/ECC

title: n8n-io/n8n

title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
content: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
summary: OpenAI分享了在部署长时间运行的AI模型时获得的经验，强调了新的安全风险、观察到的失败案例，以及通过迭代部署改进的安全措施。
highlights: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models
highlighting new safety risks, observed failures
improved safeguards through iterative deployment

title: A scorecard for the AI age
content: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
summary: OpenAI首席财务官Sarah Friar提出AI时代记分卡，通过有用工作、每成功任务成本、可靠性和计算回报来衡量AI投资回报率。
highlights: Sarah Friar introduces a practical AI scorecard
measure ROI through useful work
cost per successful task
dependability
return on compute

title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
summary: Grabette是一个用于记录机器人操作数据的开放系统，旨在简化数据采集流程，支持多种传感器和机器人平台，并提供标准化数据格式以促进研究共享。
highlights: Grabette provides an open system for recording robot manipulation data.
It supports multiple sensors and robot platforms.
The system uses a standardized data format to facilitate sharing and reproducibility.

title: Introducing Cosmos 3 Edge
summary: NVIDIA 发布 Cosmos 3 Edge 模型，专为边缘设备优化，提供高效推理与低延迟性能，支持多种视觉任务。
highlights: Cosmos 3 Edge 专为边缘设备设计，实现高效推理。
模型在低延迟场景下表现优异，适用于实时应用。
支持多种视觉任务，如目标检测与图像分类。
